examples: Olduvai Gorge, an early hominid site in Tanzania, was found by a butterfly hunter who literally fell into its deep valley in 1911.
A hominid is really any extinct ape more closely related to us than the chimpanzee.
But some now think it could have been an earlier hominid known as Homo habilis.
There seem to have been two hominid species present at Swartkrans around two million years ago.
In other words, we are descended from hominid wusses who thrived because they kept away from spiders.
